title: See What's Really on Your Network: Elasticsearch, Kibana, and Zeek from Scratch
summary: A full, copy-paste walkthrough for standing up your own network-visibility stack — Zeek watching the wire, Elasticsearch storing what it sees, Kibana making it searchable. Includes the part most guides skip: what to do when your switch can't mirror traffic.

title: The Other Half of Visibility: Endpoint Detection with Wazuh
summary: Network monitoring shows you what crossed the wire. It can't show you what happened on the machine. This is the endpoint half — a full, copy-paste walkthrough for standing up Wazuh and putting agents on your devices to watch files, logs, configurations, and vulnerabilities.
